phases: Phase 1: Iteration-versioned writer + sidecar duality + history binding (TDD first)
Phase 2: Latest-iteration resolution with legacy fallback (TDD first)

limitations: Immutability enforced at the writer; filesystem tampering detectable only via provenance sidecar (unchanged from Phase 158)
Legacy session dirs keep singleton-only semantics; re-runs there start iteration numbering without recovering lost bytes
non_goals: No retroactive migration of existing session dirs
No change to schema semantics, provenance env binding, tier_guard short-chain rules, or hook fail-open behavior
